description: Complete Pokopia Pokédex - all 303 Pokémon with types, specialties, habitats, time, weather, favorites in English and Traditional Chinese (zh_TW)

habitats.zh_TW: 無法抗拒的香氣與光芒
無法抗拒的香氣與光芒
草木圍繞的自動販賣機

event_name.zh_TW: 為毽子草尋找更多孢子

event_info.notes: First limited-time event in Pokémon Pokopia. Hoppip appears at the Pokémon Center entrance and asks for help collecting Cotton Spores from Dream Islands. Common encounter in the Yellow Carpet habitat. Requires a rebuilt Pokémon Center to access the event. Not available on Cloud Islands.

event_name.zh_TW: 為毽子草尋找更多孢子

event_info.notes: Rare encounter in the Yellow Carpet habitat. Common encounter in the Field-trip Friends habitat (requires Flower Backpack, Lunch Box, and Hoppip Water Bottle). Requires a rebuilt Pokémon Center to access the event. Not available on Cloud Islands.

event_name.zh_TW: 為毽子草尋找更多孢子

event_info.notes: Very rare encounter. The most valuable event Pokémon due to having two specialties (Grow and Litter). Best attracted using the Dandelion Lunchtime habitat (requires Dandy Flower, Flower Cushion, Flowery Table Setting, and Lunch Box). Requires a rebuilt Pokémon Center to access the event. Not available on Cloud Islands.
